description: The SupporterCreditList component is used to get a list of supporters currently supporting the game financially.

fields.CreditType: What kind of supporter level/category to get names from.
fields.Separator: How to separate the list of names.
fields.Prefix: What to put at the beginning of each name (Usually a color tag)
fields.Suffix: What to put at the end of each name (Usually a color tag ender.
